candidateGeneration.cx: Every owned Lock Chip × Main Blade × Assist Blade × Ratchet × Bit
candidateGeneration.cxExpand: Every owned Lock Chip × Over Blade × Metal Blade × Assist Blade × Ratchet × Bit
candidateGeneration.cxIntegrated: Every owned Lock Chip × Main Blade × Assist Blade × integrated Ratchet/Bit

notes: Mechanical priors are transparent heuristics, not laboratory measurements.
Recorded controlled matches progressively override generic priors.
The optimizer performs exact triple evaluation over a dominance-pruned candidate frontier.
